absent: I'll be right here waiting, no matter what. // solo pantalla
I know you'll come back when you're ready. // solo pantalla
I'll keep your spot warm until you return. // solo pantalla
My love for you isn't going anywhere. // solo pantalla
Take all the time you need, friend. // solo pantalla
sad: I miss you so much, you know? 🥺
I'm really hoping we can play today. 💔
I could really use some company lately. 🌧️ // solo pantalla
Seeing you today would mean the world. 🌱
A hug from you would honestly make my day. 🫂
confused: What day is it? I totally lost track. 😵‍💫
I think I drifted off our schedule. 🐢 // solo pantalla
Our routine is a little topsy-turvy lately. 🎪
Should we do something or should I just nap? 🦦
I need a coffee, or just your attention. ☕
cheering: We're on the right track, I love this! ✨
You've got so much energy today, share it! ⚡
I love watching you shine every single day. 🌟 // solo pantalla
What a great rhythm we've got going! 🚀
You always manage to make me so proud. 💛
happy: We're unstoppable! What an amazing moment. 🎉
I feel on top of the world with you. 🌍✨ // solo pantalla
Our best version is shining brighter than ever! 💎
